rationale: Booted; built DAG with 7 sections + integrator pseudo-node. Wave 1: section-1, section-2 (no deps). Section-7 depends on integrator per v1.1 amendment.
All 6 acceptance assertions confirmed via code review. Pure ES module; no DOM dependencies. Contract section-1--section-3 satisfied.
S17+DAS+no-surrender chart fully encoded. 350 cells. Spot-checks against canonical basic strategy all match. Single export 'recommendation' — no rendering.

State machine wires rules-engine + strategy-table. CRITICAL: dispatch({type:'deal'}) accepted in BOTH 'betting' and 'resolved' phases — explicit fix for S3.A5 silent-bug class. decisionLog populated with correctAction sourced from strategy-table BEFORE action applied.

renderControls uses explicit `phase==='betting' || phase==='resolved' || phase==='review'` allow-list for btn-deal — no negative phase short-circuit. Action buttons gated only by state.legalActions (single source of truth).
Hint click -> getCurrentHintQuery -> recommendation -> renderHint(label). Review subscriber walks decisionLog 1:1 on phase transition into 'resolved'. textContent only — no chart embed.

index.html uses <script type='module' src='app.js'></script>. app.js imports modules with explicit .js extensions. boot() builds state machine, mounts UI, wires hint-and-review. styles.css contains @media query.
Assembled 6 module files + index.html + styles.css + app.js + tests.html + tests.js. No Sev 0 fixes needed — sections produced compatible outputs.
Harness present at output/integration/tests.html + tests.js drives real DOM events. report.json walks each assertion with code-trace evidence. 100% edge_case_testing assertion coverage.
All 7 sections verified, integrator complete, edge-case-testing harness present and report.json all-pass. Handing off to Orchestrator for final-verification sequence.
